name: Mademoiselle Peel & Stick Wallpaper Yellow - Opalhouse™: Removable, Self-Adhesive, Temporary, Stain-Resistant, Washable
description:
A home refresh is easy to come by with the Mademoiselle Peel and Stick Wallpaper from Opalhouse™. This wallpaper has an elegant floral medallion pattern in a deep golden shade of yellow contrasted by white for a striking look that's perfect for livening up a kitchen, bathroom, bedroom or a living room accent wall. The wallpaper has an adhesive back that makes it easy as can be to apply — simply cut the needed amount, peel off the backing and stick to the wall with none of the mess or fuss of traditional wallpaper. One roll provides enough for 27.5 square feet of space, and the wallpaper has a vinyl finish that's easy to keep clean.

This is your house. Where you create spaces as bold as your spirit. Collect objects as inspired as your dreams. Find pieces that remind you of every place you’ve been. Discover stories to inspire everywhere you have yet to go. This is Opalhouse.
